violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. Meat stored in bag in freezer was open and not protected from potential contamination.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. Measuring cup stored in rice/sugar was not stored handle up out of product.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. Bags of meat in freezer, open containers in refrigerators, and other food products out of original containers did not have any date marking.
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
